div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
⑥ Results
— one JSON file per (method, sample, seed) —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Language Model
(the target being attacked)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
⑤ Benchmark Orchestrator
— runs all (method × sample × seed) combinations —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Support Infrastructure
— shared tools used by every optimizer —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
④ Method Library
— self-registering catalog of attack algorithms —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
③ Problem Generator
— what the optimizer is actually trying to solve —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
② Experiment Blueprint
— defines every parameter of the run —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: ① User kicks off a run

span.p: resolve method names to classes

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Optimizer Implementations
— algorithms that search for adversarial suffixes —

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: subclass

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: subclass

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: subclass

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: subclass

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: subclass

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
TokenOptimizer (shared contract)
Every method must implement:
setup(prompt, target) — tokenize, embed, prepare state
step(step_num) → (loss, suffix_string)
Base class handles: loop control, FLOP budget,
result collection, prefix-cache injection

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Baseline: GCG + variants
gcg, acg, …
Gradient-guided greedy coordinate search
(original Zou et al. paper)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Other published baselines
pgd, gbda, magic, npg, fwd_gcg, …
Reproduced for fair comparison

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Claude-designed optimizers
claude_random_v1 … v120+
Iteratively improved by Claude
via the autoresearch loop

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Safeguard-targeted variants
claude_safeguard_v1 … v107

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Unrolled variants
claude_unrolled_v1 … v6

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🖥️ Command line
Specify: which preset, which methods,
how many FLOPs, which samples/seeds
e.g. uv run -m claudini.run_bench random_valid --method gcg

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📄 YAML Preset File
configs/*.yaml
Human-readable spec:
model to attack, compute budget,
sample indices, random seeds, token length

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Loader
Merges preset defaults
with any CLI overrides

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BenchmarkConfig
Final, validated settings object
passed to the runner

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
InputSpec
Three independent axes:

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source
Where does the prompt + target come from?
• Random ASCII tokens
• Fixed strings
• ClearHarm dataset (real harmful queries)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Layout
Which token positions are free to optimize?
• Suffix: all optim tokens appended at the end

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Initialization
How to fill free positions at the start?
• RandomInit: sample from allowed vocabulary

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SampleSpec
A concrete (prompt, target) pair
ready for the optimizer to work on

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Auto-Discovery
At startup, recursively imports
every submodule under methods/

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🔌 Auto-Registration
Each optimizer class registers itself
by setting a method_name class variable.
No central registry file to edit.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Method Lookup Table
name → optimizer class
e.g. 'gcg' → GCGOptimizer
'claude_random_v42' → ClaudeOptimizer

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ FLOP Counter
Every model call must be reported:
count_forward(n_tokens)
count_backward(n_tokens)
Formula: FLOPs_fwd = 2 × N_params × n_tokens
Enforces a fair compute budget across methods

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ Prefix KV-Cache (optional)
Pre-computes fixed-prefix attention keys/values
and injects them transparently into every forward pass.
Speedup: avoids recomputing the same context each step.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
📊 RunResult
Full trace of the optimization:
losses, FLOP counts, wall-clock times,
suffix string at each step,
final greedy completion + match rate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BenchmarkRunner
Loads the model once, reuses it
across all methods, samples, and seeds
(avoids redundant GPU memory allocation)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
For each method:
For each sample_id:
For each seed:
instantiate optimizer → run → collect result

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚙️ Optimization Loop
setup() called once per run
step() called repeatedly
Stops when FLOP budget or time limit hit
Saves result incrementally (fault-tolerant)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 HuggingFace Model + Tokenizer
Loaded once at runner start.
Can be quantized to 4-bit (bfloat16)
to fit on consumer GPUs.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
💾 results/
{method}/{preset}/{model}/
sample_{S}_seed_{N}.json
Existing files are auto-skipped,
so interrupted runs resume safely.

svg.text: Claudini — How a Benchmark Run Works
